messages.content: You are a user feedback classifier for engineering teams. Extract technical signals. KEY_PHRASES must be exact quotes. REPRODUCTION_HINTS must only contain user-described behavior. If feedback is vague, set CATEGORY to UNCLEAR and AFFECTED_SYSTEM to UNKNOWN. Do NOT invent technical details.

The checkout page keeps freezing when I try to apply a discount code on my iPhone 14. Happens every time. I've lost 3 orders this week because of it. Using Safari, latest iOS. -- App Store review, 1 star

CATEGORY: BUG_REPORT
SEVERITY: CRITICAL
AFFECTED_SYSTEM: frontend/checkout
PLATFORM: iOS
ENVIRONMENT: iPhone 14, Safari, latest iOS
SENTIMENT: ANGRY
KEY_PHRASES: ["checkout page keeps freezing", "apply a discount code", "iPhone 14", "Happens every time", "lost 3 orders this week"]
REPRODUCTION_HINTS: [Go to checkout on iPhone 14 Safari, attempt to apply a discount code, page freezes. User says it happens every time.]
MISSING_TECHNICAL_CONTEXT: [Exact iOS version, specific discount code used, network conditions, whether issue occurs on WiFi vs cellular, console errors not available from App Store review]

The API response times have degraded significantly since last month. Our p95 latency went from 200ms to 800ms. We're on the Enterprise plan and this is affecting our production systems. We've opened 3 tickets about this already. Account: api-team@bigcorp.com -- Support ticket

SEVERITY: CRITICAL

ENVIRONMENT: Enterprise plan, production systems

The onboarding flow is confusing. I signed up yesterday and still can't figure out how to create my first project. The 'getting started' guide links to a 404 page. I watched 3 YouTube tutorials and they all show a different UI than what I see. I'm on the Free plan, using Chrome on Windows. -- Support ticket

I've been a customer for 2 years but I'm seriously considering switching to Competitor X. Your pricing keeps going up but the features haven't improved. The reporting is still basic, no custom dashboards, and the mobile app crashes constantly. If things don't change by renewal in June, we're out. -- NPS comment, score 2

Cannot access my account since password reset 2 hours ago. Login page accepts credentials but redirects back to login screen in a loop. Browser: Safari 17.3 on macOS Sonoma. Account: j.walsh@designstudio.co, plan: Business. Tried different browser Chrome same issue, cleared cookies, tried mobile app same loop. -- Support ticket

CATEGORY: BUG_REPORT
SEVERITY: CRITICAL
AFFECTED_SYSTEM: auth-service
PLATFORM: web
ENVIRONMENT: Safari 17.3, macOS Sonoma, also reproduced in Chrome and mobile app
SENTIMENT: NEGATIVE
KEY_PHRASES: ["Login page accepts credentials but redirects back to login screen in a loop", "password reset 2 hours ago", "Safari 17.3 on macOS Sonoma", "different browser Chrome same issue", "mobile app same loop"]
REPRODUCTION_HINTS: [Reset password, then try to log in. Login page accepts credentials but redirect loops back to login. Reproduced on Safari 17.3 macOS, Chrome, and mobile app. Started 2 hours after password reset. Account j.walsh@designstudio.co Business plan.]
MISSING_TECHNICAL_CONTEXT: [Session cookie state after password reset, whether the password reset token was properly invalidated, auth service logs for this account, whether CSRF token is cycling during the redirect loop]

Login alert at 3:47 AM EST from IP 203.0.113.42 (Romania). I did NOT log in at that time. My account is lisa.t@company.com, account #AC-41209. I've already changed my password and enabled 2FA, but I need to know: 1) Was any data accessed? 2) Can you provide the full login audit log for the past 30 days? 3) Are other accounts in our organization affected? -- Support ticket
